form.formComment: Mare returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation third of 15 at Gold Coast Mm Trophy January 17 over 2200m, 2.5 len behind Snitzanova with 60kg at $7.50. Previously first up; fifth of 12 at Eagle Farm Hcp November 8 over 1400m, 2 len behind Anemacore with 58kg at $15. Before last prep had won four of six when fresh so don't underestimate.
